title: Indias Electricity Production Remains Strong
summary:
Main
By Jeffrey Landsberg
As we discussed in Commodore Research's most recent Weekly Dry Bulk Report, India produced approximately 118.3 billion kilowatt hours of electricity in February. This is down month-on-month by 9.5 billion kilowatt hours (-7%) but up year-on-year by 6.9 billion kilowatt hours (6%). India's electricity output has remained strong as we have been predicting and has now increased on a year-on-year basis for ten straight months.
